session_note: S84 — user-queued 2-priority batch ahead of backlog work: (P1) pooped-cruiser grab gate — while a player's spark is pooped and trailing, the cruiser must NOT be able to grab primitives until the spark catches up; (P2) RAINBOW FLYOVER event — on rainbow-click switches, a dumb-looking rainbow character with a crooked tooth arcs left-to-right across the screen yelling a stupid voice line ('gnyaaaahngniiinghyouuu') while the whole background pulses colorful/trippy bright lights for the switch duration. User directive: 'Make it happen! be creative technical and thorough! then push it so i can check it out today', then CHECK/ANALYZE + /handoff. Model: Fable 5 (user-sanctioned S82/S83 precedent).
council_result: R1 Trident Strike (Grok 4.20 reasoning: 8-item review, 5 challenges; Gemini 2.5-pro: APPROVE + 3 challenges) -> Claude synthesis. Battle Ledger 8 rows: P1 gate ships (Grok alternatives overruled 2.0>1.75), P2 sync design CHANGED by A.0 probe (one-shot effects lose ~5/6 cross-wire at 10Hz sampling vs per-frame wipe) -> synced rainbowSwitchTick field (additive-optional, S82 poopedUntilTick precedent, no schema bump); Gemini stacking/mid-join specs adopted; shader+RNG-arc alternatives rejected. PRIME-AUDIT delta documented in PDR. PDR: .claude/plans-archive/2026-06-10_PDR_S84_pooped-grab_rainbow-flyover_IN-PROGRESS.md. User pre-approval verbatim: 'Make it happen! be creative technical and and thorough! then push it so i can check it out today'

priorities.label: S84 P1 — POOPED-CRUISER PICKUP GATE: while poop-debuffed, PICKUP_SPARK requires avatar arrival within POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS of the spark
priorities.objective: Pooped players' cursors must not grab free sparks at full mouse speed; the 7px/tick chasing avatar must physically arrive first. Silent reject + diagnostics counter; host-authoritative; zero wire change.

Reliable on both peers via additive-optional synced field.
